---
title: "Schedule"
---

This schedule page will be updated frequently with the most current event information.

**Friday, March 20**

TBD

**Saturday, March 21**

TBD

**Sunday, March 22** 

TBD

<!-- BEGIN 2025 ARCHIVED SCHEDULE -->
<!-- **Friday, April 4** -->

<!-- - 5:00pm: Check-in at Penn Pavilion -->
<!-- - 6:00pm: Data kick-off -->
<!-- - 6:30pm: Dinner -->
<!-- - 9:30pm: Activity -->
<!-- - 12:00am: Consulting support ends; DataFest closes -->

<!-- **Saturday, April 5** -->

<!-- - 9:00am: DataFest continues at Penn Pavilion -->
<!-- - 9:30am: Breakfast -->
<!-- - 12:00pm: group photo -->
<!-- - 1:00pm: Lunch -->
<!-- - 4:00pm: [activity] -->
<!-- - 6:30pm: Dinner & activity -->
<!-- - 12:00am: Consulting support ends; DataFest closes -->

<!-- **Sunday, April 6** -->

<!-- *Consultants available until 12:00pm* -->

<!-- - 9:00am DataFest continues at Penn Pavilion -->
<!-- - 9:30am breakfast -->
<!-- - 12:00pm: Lunch + projects due -->
<!-- - 1:00pm: Round 1 judging -->
<!-- - 3:00-5:00pm Final round of judging + awards -->
<!-- END 2025 ARCHIVED SCHEDULE -->


<!-- 2024 schedule -->
<!-- - 5:00pm: Check-in at Penn Pavilion -->
<!-- - 6:00pm: Data kick-off -->
<!-- - 6:30pm: Dinner -->
<!-- - 9:30pm: Trivia -->
<!-- - 12:00am: Consulting support ends -->
<!-- - 2:00am: DataFest closes for the evening -->

<!-- 2023 schedule -->
<!-- - 5:00pm: Check-in begins at Perkins Library Link near the Help Desk (floor L1) -->
<!-- - 6:00pm: Data kick-off at Levine Science Research Center (LSRC) B101. -->
<!-- - 6:30pm: DataFest moves to Perkins Link for Dinner, and check-in continues at Perkins Link near the Help Desk (floor L1); workspace assignments are released -->
<!-- - 9:00pm: DataFest support and consulting runs until 9pm. -->



<!-- - 9:00am: DataFest continues at Penn Pavilion -->
<!-- - 9:30am: Breakfast -->
<!-- - 12:00pm: group photo -->
<!-- - 1:00pm: Lunch & trivia -->
<!-- - 4:00pm: wrist stretches -->
<!-- - 6:30pm: Dinner & trivia -->
<!-- - 11:00pm: Trivia -->
<!-- - 12:00am: Consulting support ends -->
<!-- - 2:00am: DataFest closes for the evening -->



<!-- - 10:00am: DataFest continues at Perkins Library: breakfast + coffee + tea -->
<!-- - 12:30pm: Group photo -->
<!-- - 1:00pm: Lunch -->
<!-- - 2:00pm: Activity break -->
<!-- - 4:00pm: Activity break -->
<!-- - 6:00pm: Dinner & trivia -->
<!-- - 9:00pm: DataFest support and consulting runs until 9pm. -->



<!-- *Consultants available until 12:00pm* -->

<!-- - 9:00am DataFest continues at Penn Pavilion -->
<!-- - 9:30am breakfast -->
<!-- - 12:00pm: Lunch + projects due -->
<!-- - 1:00pm: Round 1 judging -->
<!-- - 3:00-5:00pm Final round of judging + awards -->

<!-- *Consultants available for help until 12:00pm.* -->

<!-- - 10:00am: DataFest continues at Perkins + breakfast + coffee + tea -->
<!-- - 12:00pm: Lunch + projects due! -->
<!-- - 1:00pm-2:30pm: Round 1 judging -->
<!-- - 3:00pm-5:00pm: Final round of judging & awards in Levine Science Research Center (LSRC) B101 -->

#### Google map addresses

<!-- - Penn Pavilion: [107 Union Dr, Durham, NC 27710](https://maps.app.goo.gl/gXVJiMBw8x4jNiru9) -->

<!-- <iframe src="https://www.google.com/maps/embed?pb=!1m18!1m12!1m3!1d3227.8243789566163!2d-78.945684149699!3d36.00015750176001!2m3!1f0!2f0!3f0!3m2!1i1024!2i768!4f13.1!3m3!1m2!1s0x89ace6b0062c689b%3A0x418fe3d44783c11b!2sPenn%20Pavilion!5e0!3m2!1sen!2sus!4v1705005781165!5m2!1sen!2sus" width="600" height="450" style="border:0;" allowfullscreen="" loading="lazy" referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade"></iframe> -->

- Perkins library: [411 Chapel Drive, Durham, NC 27708](https://goo.gl/maps/JGGawKRZBm2ygq4S8)

- Fitzpatrick center: [101 Science Drive, Research Dr, Durham, NC 27708](https://maps.app.goo.gl/dKRcTRwFfAuKgtNM6)

<iframe src="https://www.google.com/maps/embed?pb=!1m28!1m12!1m3!1d3227.7002367054847!2d-78.94062626049451!3d36.003190366067535!2m3!1f0!2f0!3f0!3m2!1i1024!2i768!4f13.1!4m13!3e2!4m5!1s0x89ace6ae4f2e0325%3A0x15d70725343a1cd4!2s411%20Chapel%20Dr%2C%20Durham%2C%20NC%2027708!3m2!1d36.0029782!2d-78.9383263!4m5!1s0x89ace6ae2705c505%3A0xebe4fa6e621cb48d!2sFitzpatrick%20Center%20for%20Interdisciplinary%20Engineering%2C%20Medicine%20and%20Applied%20Sciences%2C%20101%20Science%20Dr%2C%20Durham%2C%20NC%2027705!3m2!1d36.0031501!2d-78.9406158!5e0!3m2!1sen!2sus!4v1767896720948!5m2!1sen!2sus" width="600" height="450" style="border:0;" allowfullscreen="" loading="lazy" referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade"></iframe>

Convenient parking in [Bryan Center Garage](https://goo.gl/maps/3Ed2a1NsQxjFsyci6)
